element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Primary weapon available from beginning; establishes core combat mechanic
Basic threat type; must learn to destroy or avoid
Introduces protection mechanic; shooting them halts score counter
Allows player choice of new regions with different terrain/weather
Special weapons acquisition point; summoned via dashboard button when light flashes
Limited ammunition special weapon; becomes flamethrower in speedboat mode
Limited ammunition special weapon; persists in speedboat mode
Limited ammunition special weapon; effective against helicopter and air threats
Drops bombs from overhead; introduces verticality threat

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Periodic optional or forced transition via boathouse
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Vehicle transformation mechanic; water-based combat with altered weapon behavior
Can attack from front or behind; requires defensive and offensive positioning

typical_relief_triggers: Weapons van appearance (access to special weapons)
Transition to new territory with fresh enemy patterns
Brief respite during speedboat mode if player gains distance
typical_tension_triggers: Road craters from bombing creating hazardous terrain
Forced speedboat transition exposing player to different threat patterns
Enemy vehicles attempting to force car off road
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Continuous scrolling forward creates inherent momentum; tension escalates through accumulating threats (enemy density, helicopter appearances) and terrain hazards; relief granted through weapon acquisition, territory transitions, and score milestones

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Road forks allow player choice of territory branches; weapons van appears as visual landmark in each new region

difficulty_curve.early_game: Initial unlimited car supply provides learning phase; basic enemy vehicles and machine gun only
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Score thresholds required to earn extra cars; special weapons introduced; enemy variety increases with helicopter appearances
difficulty_curve.late_game: Sustained pressure from multiple enemy types; limited ammunition on special weapons; speedboat transitions add combat variety and new threat patterns
notable_spikes: First helicopter encounter introduces bombing mechanic
Transition from car to speedboat mode shifts threat angles and weapon effectiveness
End of unlimited car phase forces score-conscious play

notable_level_patterns.description: Game divides into distinct regions accessible via road forks; each territory features different terrain, weather conditions, and periodic weapons van placement
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Generic regional transition (original arcade; NES port maintains structure)

notable_level_patterns.description: Enemy vehicle density and variety increases over play duration; helicopter threats add vertical dimension to otherwise horizontal road combat
Optional or forced transitions to speedboat mode create combat breaks; water-based segments use same basic mechanics (enemies, weapons, hazards) but in different environmental context
Constant movement increments score; destroying enemies grants bonus points; hitting civilians halts score temporarily; off-road position yields no points, creating dynamic risk assessment

sources_used: Wikipedia - Spy Hunter (Gameplay section; Development section; Reception section)
